title: Resolution regarding formation of Jute Advisory Board

(जेसीआई), कोलकाता सद瀡य vii. िनदेशक, क犆灶ीय पटसन एवं संब獳 फाइबर अनुसंधान सं瀡थान (सीआरआईजेएएफ), कृिष मं灴ालय, कोलकाता सद瀡य viii. अ瀇य楹, भारतीय पटसन िमल संघ (आईजेएमए), कोलकाता सद瀡य ix. अ瀇य楹, पटसन गांठ िनमा榁ता संघ, कोलकाता सद瀡य -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I—SEC. 1] x. आयु猴-सह-सिचव, (ह犉डलूम, व球 और ह瀡तिश瀖प िवभाग), ओड़ीशा सरकार सद瀡य xi. 灹मुख सिचव, उ獸ोग, वािण榖य और उ獸म िवभाग, ि灴पुरा सरकार सद瀡य xii. सिचव (ह犉डलूम और व球), उ獸ोग और वािण榖य िवभाग,आं灷 灹देश सरकार सद瀡य xiii. असम सरकार का एक आिधका琇रक 灹ितिनिध (नािमत 琈कया जाना है) सद瀡य xiv. पि玑म बंगाल सरकार का एक आिधका琇रक 灹ितिनिध (नािमत 琈कया जाना है) सद瀡य xv. िबहार सरकार का एक आिधका琇रक 灹ितिनिध (नािमत 琈कया जाना है) सद瀡य xvi. मेघालय सरकार का एक आिधका琇रक 灹ितिनिध (नािमत 琈कया जाना है) सद瀡य 2. बोड榁 सामा瀈यतया पटसन एवं मे瀡टा के उ瀄पादन अनुमान犘 सिहत पटसन एवं पटसन व瀡灴 िनयं灴ण आदेश, 2016 के 楹े灴ािधकार के अंतग榁त आने वाले पटसन संबंधी मामल犘 पर सरकार को परामश榁 देगा। 3. सद瀡य, बोड榁 म犆 इस संक瀖प के भारत के राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत होने क琉 ितिथ से 2 वष榁 क琉 अविध के िलए काय榁 कर犆गे। ए. मधुकुमार रे獕ी, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF TEXTILES RESOLUTION New Delhi, the 19th July, 2018 F. No. 7/1/2014-Jute.—The Government of India has decided to reconstitute the Jute Advisory Board as per the following composition:- (i) Secretary (Textiles) - Chairperson (ii) Joint Secretary, dealing with Jute, M/o Textiles, New Delhi - Member (iii) Jute Commissioner, Kolkata - Member Secretary (iv) Agriculture Commissioner, D/o Agriculture, Co-operation & Farmers’ Welfare, Krishi Bhawan, New Delhi. - Member (v) Director, Directorate of Jute Development, Kolkata - Member (vi) Chairman & Managing Director, Jute Corporation of India Ltd.(JCI), Kolkata - Member (vii) Director, Central Research Institute for Jute & Allied Fibres, (CRIJAF) Ministry of Agriculture, Kolkata - Member (viii) Chairman, Indian Jute Mills Association (IJMA), Kolkata - Member (ix) President, Jute Balers Association, Kolkata - Member -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx Iμ[k.M 1º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 (x) Commissioner-cum-Secretary (Handlooms, Textiles & Handicrafts Department), Govt. of Odisha - Member (xi) Principal Secretary, D/o Industry, Commerce & Enterprises, Govt. of West Bengal - Member (xii) Secretary to Government (Handlooms & Textiles), Industries & Commerce Department, Govt. of Andhra Pradesh - Member (xiii) One official representative of Govt. of Assam (to be nominated) - Member (xiv) One official representative of Govt. of Tripura (to be nominated) - Member (xv) One official representative of Govt. of Bihar (to be nominated) - Member (xvi) One official representative of Govt. of Meghalaya (to be nominated) - Member 2. The Board will advise the Government generally on matters pertaining to jute falling within the purview of the Jute and Jute Textile Control Order, 2016 including production estimates of Jute and Mesta. 3. The members will serve on the Board for a period of two years from the date of publication of this Resolution in the Gazette of India. A. MADHUKUMAR REDDY, Jt. Secy.
